description: LED controller hardware driver specifications for Arcade Assistant

pacled64.name: Ultimarc PacLED64

api_functions.Pac64SetLEDIntensities: Sets all 64 LED intensities in one call
api_functions.Pac64SetLEDFadeTime: Sets on-board fade time for smooth transitions
api_functions.Pac64SetScriptStepDelay: Sets delay for stored attract-mode scripts

implementation_notes: Leverage on-board fade for breathing effects
Can store 128-step attract mode sequence in flash

ledwiz.name: GroovyGameGear LED-Wiz

api_functions.LWZ_Initialize: Detects and initializes all connected LED-Wiz devices
api_functions.LWZ_SBA: Sets on/off state of all 32 outputs + global pulse speed
api_functions.LWZ_PBA: Sets brightness profile (1-49) or pulse mode (129-132) for all outputs

implementation_notes: CRITICAL: Use LWZ_PBA on startup/profile change, LWZ_SBA for real-time control
Do NOT call LWZ_PBA for on/off control - inefficient

comparison.recommendation: PacLED64 for new builds with RGB LEDs

device_specs_update.note: Update DEVICE_SPECS in led_hardware.py with these VID/PIDs
